title: Image Overlay Trigger v1 (legacy Drupal schema + CC3-906 webhook fields)
description: Per-job trigger JSON written by Drupal to s3://{trigger-bucket}/actions/{job_id}.json. Read by the ieee-rc-image-generator Lambda, which composites text overlays onto the source image and writes the output to dest_bucket/dest_name. After CC3-906, when callback_url + callback_secret_ref are present, the Lambda also POSTs an HMAC-signed image-overlay-callback-v1 payload to Drupal so it can flip image_transfer_status without polling. The webhook fields are optional for backward compatibility — pre-CC3-906 triggers without them work unchanged. This file MUST be byte-identical in Samson-Labs/ieee-cc and Samson-Labs/ieee-cc-python.

sourceBucket.description: S3 bucket holding the background image. STAGE-prefixed at runtime (dev-/staging-) — the trigger writes the unprefixed name.

sourceName.description: S3 key of the background image within sourceBucket.

destBucket.description: S3 bucket the composited output is uploaded to. Also STAGE-prefixed at runtime.

destName.description: S3 key for the output image. Format inferred from extension (.jpg / .png).

overlay.description: List of text overlay specs. Each spec carries a string `text`, a CSS-style `attributes` array (font-family, font-size, x/y as %, fill, text-anchor, font-weight), and optional `rowHeightPad` / `widthPadFactor`. See generate_legacy_overlay() for the full attribute set.

request_id.description: CC3-906. Echoed back in the callback so Drupal can verify ownership before updating an item. Optional — when absent, no callback is attempted.

item_id.description: CC3-906. Echoed back in the callback. Drupal loads ProductLoadItem by this id.

callback_url.description: CC3-906. Drupal endpoint receiving the completion webhook. Absence disables the callback (backward-compat with pre-CC3-906 triggers).

callback_secret_ref.description: CC3-906. Secrets Manager key holding the HMAC-SHA256 secret for the callback. Lambda falls back to the DRUPAL_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var if SM lookup fails. Same resolution policy as the wizard transfer pipeline (CC3-896).
